summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard and Footer Pages features. All backend APIs (15 tests) and frontend functionality working correctly. Admin can view stats, list users, edit subscriptions, toggle roles, delete users. Non-admin users correctly blocked from admin endpoints (403) and Admin link hidden from sidebar.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor Recharts initialization issue, non-blocking

passed_tests: Footer pages accessible at /contact, /terms, /privacy
Footer links (Terms, Privacy, Contact) work on Landing Page
Footer links (Terms, Privacy, Contact) work on Pricing Page
Contact page loads with form and contact info
Terms page loads with legal content
Privacy page loads with privacy policy
Admin login returns role='admin' in response
Admin can access /api/admin/stats - returns all expected stats
Admin can list users at /api/admin/users
Admin user search functionality works
Admin can update user subscription (plan, status)
Admin can toggle user role (admin/user)
Admin cannot delete themselves (400 error)
Non-admin users get 403 on /api/admin/* endpoints
Non-admin users cannot see Admin link in sidebar
Non-admin users see error toast when accessing /app/admin
Invalid role values rejected (400)
Invalid subscription status values rejected (400)
Admin Dashboard shows: Total Users, Active Subscriptions, Total Articles, Sites, Monthly Revenue, Trial Users, Active Today
Admin Dashboard shows Plan Breakdown (Starter, Pro, Agency, Enterprise)
Edit User dialog opens with Plan and Status dropdowns
Delete User confirmation dialog works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard and Footer Pages fully tested. Admin user (seamanshelp2021@gmail.com) has role='admin'. Backend properly returns role field in login response. Admin link in sidebar styled with red color and only visible to admin users. All admin CRUD operations working - edit subscription, toggle role, delete user. Non-admin users blocked at API level (403) and UI level (Admin link hidden).
